## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content production, AI positioning, and social media workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production has ramped up, with 25 articles in progress or ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Sunbit's AI positioning document expected next week; 10-20 AI-focused articles planned for Aug/Sept](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [New AI-powered social media content workflow introduced, customizable to Sunbit's needs](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Sunbit shared insights on their social media strategy, focusing on Facebook and Instagram](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [18 articles ready, 7 more coming in the next two days](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Sunbit slightly behind on publishing due to rebranding work](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Plans to automate WordPress publishing through Atlas connector](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [B2B content batch wrapping up alongside ongoing B2C content](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### AI Positioning and Content

  - [Sunbit finalizing AI positioning document, expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Planning 10-20 AI-focused articles for late August/early September launch](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [GrowthX to create content pipeline and timeline once document is received](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Initial focus on 5 articles, then ramping up production](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

### Social Media Workflow Improvements

  - [New AI-powered workflow introduced using Atlas for social content generation](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Customizable inputs including company profile, guidance, and platform selection](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Outputs include topic, platform-specific posts, and character counts](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Sunbit provided examples of current social media strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
      - [Focus on Facebook and Instagram for FinTech channel](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [Use of stylized visuals and condensed blog content](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [Tagging partners for increased engagement](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [Video content performing well, especially for B2B](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)

### AI Development Discussion

  - [Jason shared experience building an AI application in 4 hours using Manus, Lovable, and Supabase](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Discussed potential for AI in rapid application development and business creation](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Highlighted importance of staying current with AI technologies in various industries](https://fathom.video/share/vihqxqnmbR3JSrk6st_cupAsaM4Huy2g?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
